rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANNE SHIRLEY OUTIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #7, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/30/2023 per counsel's request. The following issues must be addressed: 1) Re the DE-120 form: i) The box at item 1 must be checked. ii) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form at least 15 days before the hearing. 2) Direct notice must continue to be given to Royal National Institute as personal representative of the sole beneficiary's estate, until a directive signed by Royal National Institute stating that notice to their attorney is sufficient is filed. See LRSF 14.14(G). 3) An original statement of each financial account listed on Schedules E & F must be filed to verify the ending balances (LRSF 14.34(D)), together with a declaration re retention of the originals required by LRSF 14.59(A). 4) An allegation must be made as to whether there are any assignments or powers of attorney that may affect distribution. LRSF 14.35(J)(1). 5) The petition must be amended and renoticed to allege a specific period for which a continuance of administration is sought. LRSF 14.35(J)(2).

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RAYMUNDO LUNA TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Authority To Sell Real Property; For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement; And For Request To Vacate Order Authorizing Subdivision And Sale Of Real Property Lot, Filed On March 28, 2023
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) No additional bond ($66,000) ordered by the Court on 04/26/2023 has been filed. 2) On 03/28/2023, the Court issued an order approving the trustee's petition to subdivide and improve the trust's real property commonly known as 83 Lisbon Street, San Francisco. The petition alleges that the subdivision authorized by the Court's 03/28/2023 order turned out to be less desirable and marketable and is no longer feasible. The petition requests that the Court's 03/28/2023 order be vacated without identifying any legal basis, such as a motion for relief under CCP section 473(b) on the ground of the trustee's or her attorney's mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or neglect. It should also be noted that the 03/28/2023 order merely authorized, but did not compel or otherwise direct, the trustee to subdivide the Lisbon property. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HANG WU
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The following proocedural issues need to be cleared. (1) Need clarification of distributable amount to the personal rep of the estate of Koon Hai Wu. Petition alleges $243,683.69 in cash is in Administrator's possession and the balance to be distributed is 184,500 according to Wellman's Declaration filed 8/11/23. However, the balance should be $182,713.69. $243,683.69 - (IRS $43,195 + FTB $14,309 + stat fees to attorney $2,600 + reimburse to attorney $866) = $182,713.69 balance (2) Appears Affidavit for Collection of Personal Property cannot be used by two sons to collect Koon Hai Wu's share in this case. It is not signed by both sons and it does not have a certified death certificate. (3) Even if the above (2) defects have been cleared, the distribution needs to be made to the personal rep of the estate of Koon Hai Wu who died before 4/1/2022 and whose estate seems to exceed $166,250 indeed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF KRISTINE B. MORGAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/02/2023 (no earlier date available), as the following issues (e-mailed to petitioner in pro per on 08/07/2023) remain unaddressed: 1) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(C)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form at least 15 days before the hearing. New notice of the continued hearing must be given. 2) The proof of service attached to the DE-120 form must show direct notice given to each minor. See CRC 7.51(d). 3) Paragraph 7 of the revised proposed order must specify a net amount of cash distributable to the devisee trust after payment of the petitioner's statutory fees. The specific descriptions of the distributable assets must also be included within the same paragraph. LRSF 14.35(I)(6)(a).

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF GEORGE DOWLER DICKINSON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance requried. If Petitioner does not wish to pursue this petition, a written withdrawal of petition can be filed. Otherwise, petitioners need to file other required documents two weeks prior to the hearing. This matter still appears premature for examiner's review as the following documents are not on file: Proof of publication; Duties and Liabilities of Personal Representative; Notice of Petition to Administer Estate and Proposed Order for Probate. As to Petition for Probate itself, the following procedural issues/clarifications need to be made by filing a verified supplemental declaration: (1) Petition #3.f.(2) to allege whether the decedent's will being offered is a self-proving will or not. (2) Petition #5.a.(7)-(8) to be completed re: issue of a predeceased child. (3) Petition #8 to list and identify, as #8 instructs, next of kin of the decedent as Petition #6 affirms so. (4) Petition #8 to list relationship to decedent as the instruction specifies. (5) Petition #8 to list Luin G. Kingman, Jr.'s information. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF AKIKO ISHIDA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Authority To Borrow Money Secured By Lien Against Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Please have the CASE NUMBER and the CASE NAME ready for the clerk. Parties appearing must check in for the hearing using their FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear in person or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. Please review LRSF 14.1 D. for information on remote appearances. For Zoom appearance: meeting ID is 160 225 4765 and password is 514879. For audio-only telephone appearance via Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SIOK LAYMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory And Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/23/23 at Administrator's request. If a Final I&A is not filed by 10/13/23, an apppearance will be required on 10/23/23. No further status hearing notes will be sent.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE RICHARD C BLUM & DIANNE FEINSTEIN JOINT PROPERTY REVOCABLE TRUST, U/T/A DATED 1/10/1996
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Instruct Co-Trustees To Sell Trust Property; Or To Distribute Trust Property; For Breach Of Trust; To Reduce Trustee Compensation; And To Preclude Use Of Trust Funds
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally in Room Dept 210 or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 742 2364 and password 053549. The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(c) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE MARGARET J. ANDERSON 2017 TRUS, DATED SEPTEMBER 13, 2017
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For An Order To Confirm Validity Of Trust; Confirm Trustee; And Confirm Assets To Revocable Trust [Prob. Code Ss.850(A)(3); 17200(A); And 172
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing per written order as modified.
